data.name: My Ex-Future Family 3: Endgame
data.detailed_description:
The second season of the visual novel My Future Ex-Family has ended, and the bittersweet aftertaste of the finale has subsided.

You are about to face new challenges.

Yana's suitors are becoming more persistent.

Mary expects complete obedience from you.

Eva's store demands more and more attention.

Camilla and Grace want to spend their evenings with you.

And your memory still hasn't returned. Mia is ready to help with that!

Where will the twists and turns of the plot take you?

How will it all end?

A varied ending is guaranteed!

What can you expect?

  • Lots of animations and beautiful art

  • Beautiful hot scenes

  • Incredibly attractive girls and women

  • Translations into 10+ languages

  • 6+ hours of gameplay

Add it to your wishlist and stay tuned for news!

data.short_description: My Ex-Future Family 3rd is a choice-driven adult Visual Novel focusing on the fun parts of human life. The game is packed with humor, sex, romance and plot turnings. Play as a young man who seduces girls who surround him, and build your life in town full of hot stories!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 荷蘭文, 俄文, 瑞典文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 6 GB 可用空間
